name: PLANKORSNING rug, low pile
description: PLANKORSNING Rug, low pile - gray/beige 5 ' 7 "x7 ' 10 ". The rug is handwoven by skilled craftspeople and adds a personal and vibrant expression to your room. The rug is made of wool so it’s naturally soil-repellent and very durable. This product has been tested for domestic use.
